Container.Name: huntarr2
Container.Overview: Huntarr2 performs automated quality upgrade searches for your Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr and Whisparr instances. It periodically searches for items that can be upgraded to better quality profiles, replacing manual searches with an adaptive scheduler that respects API rate limits.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port used to access the Huntarr2 web interface.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database, encryption key and configuration.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file ownership. Default 99 is the Unraid 'nobody' user.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file ownership. Default 100 is the Unraid 'users' group.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for the container (e.g. Europe/London, America/New_York).

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Application log verbosity. Accepts: trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal, panic.

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Authentication username. Both username and password must be set to enable authentication. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Authentication password. Both username and password must be set to enable authentication. Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: Optional 32-byte hex AES-256-GCM key for encrypting API keys at rest. Leave blank to auto-generate and persist in the config volume.
